name: Vault Sync
shortDescription: End-to-end encrypted file synchronization across devices.
description: Vault Sync provides military-grade encryption for your files with seamless synchronization across all your devices. Supports automatic backup, file versioning, and secure sharing.

name: Signal VPN
shortDescription: Fast and secure VPN with global server network.
description: Signal VPN offers blazing fast connection speeds with servers in 50+ countries. Features include split tunneling, kill switch, and zero-log policy.

name: Code Editor Pro
shortDescription: Professional code editor for Android with syntax highlighting.
description: Code Editor Pro supports 100+ programming languages with intelligent autocomplete, Git integration, and terminal emulator.

name: Task Flow
shortDescription: Smart task manager with AI-powered scheduling.
description: Task Flow uses AI to optimize your daily schedule, set priorities, and track progress across multiple projects.

name: Chat Hub
shortDescription: Unified messaging app for all platforms.
description: Chat Hub consolidates all your messaging platforms into one clean interface with end-to-end encryption.

name: Media Converter
shortDescription: Convert any media format quickly and easily.
description: Supports 200+ format conversions for video, audio, and images with batch processing capabilities.

name: Finance Tracker
shortDescription: Personal finance management and expense tracking.
description: Track expenses, create budgets, and get insights into your spending habits with beautiful charts and reports.

name: Learn Lang
shortDescription: Interactive language learning with native speakers.
description: Learn 30+ languages through interactive lessons, speech recognition, and conversations with native speakers.
